## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- From TEAM_SPLIT.md or PR description -->
- [ ] Code merged via PR to `develop` (never directly to `main`)
- [ ] 1 approval from a non-author team member
- [ ] CI green (lint + typecheck + tests + frontend build)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new behavior
- [ ] Docs updated if API or schema changed
